summary: Business onboarding and personalization flow. T50 (ORCHESTRATION) builds business profile with DUAL-RECORD-WRITE (PRIVATE + GLOBAL). T51 (DATA_PIPELINE) runs compatibility scoring with 30s TIMEOUT-AS-SUCCESS-MODE. T52 (ORCHESTRATION) personalizes feed from 4 independent degradable signals, emits PersonalizationCompleted.
keyPatterns: DUAL-RECORD-WRITE: A1 writes PRIVATE (full profile) + GLOBAL (4 match-safe fields) simultaneously
TIMEOUT-AS-SUCCESS-MODE: B1 30s timeout → partialResults:true → flow continues (not failure)
PARALLEL-FROM-SAME-INPUT: A1 and A2 both trigger on QuestionnaireCompleted independently
UPSTREAM-EVENT-NOT-TRIGGER: A3 triggers on BusinessProfileCreated (not QuestionnaireCompleted)
DEGRADABLE-ANALYTICS: A2 failure → segment=GENERAL fallback, never blocks flow
4 independent fallbacks in C: each signal degrades independently, degradationLevel tracked
DEBOUNCE-AS-SUBFLOW: rapid resubmission routed to SUBFLOW-02D (D1/D2/D3), not just a constraint
COMPLETION-EVENT-DISTINCT: PersonalizationCompleted — NOT OnboardingCompleted (FLOW-01 owns that)
crossFlowGate: PersonalizationCompleted from T52-D triggers FLOW-03 (EventRecommendations), FLOW-04 (ContentFeed), FLOW-05 (Gamification)
criticalConstraints: PersonalizationCompleted is MACHINE — never OnboardingCompleted (cross-flow collision with no local error)
B1 reads from xiigen-matching-profiles GLOBAL only — never xiigen-business-profiles PRIVATE
A1 dual writes: GLOBAL record must contain ONLY industryCode/businessStage/locationProximity/teamSizeTier
30s timeout is MACHINE constant — partialResults:true is a SUCCESS mode, not failureMode
Debounce key: compound tenantId+userId — single-dimension key contaminates cross-tenant
keywords: business onboarding personalization plan fan-out fan-in ORCHESTRATION DATA_PIPELINE wave-0 dual-record GLOBAL PRIVATE timeout partial results degradable
